_notes: Shanghai Cooperation Organisation full members as of May 2026: 10 states. China and Russia are the founding heavyweights; India and Pakistan joined 2017, Iran 2023, Belarus 2024. Observers and dialogue partners (Afghanistan, Mongolia, Egypt, Qatar, etc.) are NOT included — only full members.
name: Shanghai Cooperation Organisation
mission: Eurasian political, economic, and security organization spanning roughly 60% of Eurasia's landmass and 40% of the world's population. Focus on regional stability, anti-terrorism, and economic cooperation.
